core_mechanism: Solving the Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman optimal-control PDE for a value function by collapsing it along sampled state trajectories into a pathwise (method-of-characteristics) Hamilton-Jacobi equation and fitting its solution directly from data with a physics-informed neural network that penalizes the PDE residual, replacing iterative fixed-point value/policy iteration with a single supervised sweep
brief_reason: The abstract states the core innovation reduces the optimization to solving an HJB equation by projecting it onto observed trajectories as a pathwise Hamilton-Jacobi equation, solved directly from data using a PINN in one offline sweep and eliminating value or policy iteration.
